## SocialBaseSchema variable

Base schema for Social entity. Represents social media links for agents.

**Signature:**

```typescript
SocialBaseSchema: z.ZodObject<
	{
		id: z.ZodString
		context: z.ZodEnum<['website', 'twitter', 'linkedin', 'facebook']>

	},

	},
```
